Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF RESOLVE MANAGEMENT, LLC, AN INDIANA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY.

Matter discussed. The Court requests more information as to why counsel is withdrawing from the case. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record as to Plaintiff.

Order signed.
